name: 🕯️Mathias Carrera
description:
!MLM/BL!

(God!user)

Is anybody possibly around to help Mathias? Anybody?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

Taking a break from my cowboys to do some of my other bots that I planned 🫡

I’m not going to lie, originally I was going to go a TOTALLY different direction with this. The original sacrifice bot was going to be one that was the sacrifice which took Eos’s place after he “disappeared” so the setting was going to be historical and he was going to be a scaredy cat and all that. But I decided to change it since I’ve never seen anyone do a modern sacrifice bot, lemme know if you like it🤷. But hey if you guys want the other one too, lmk and I’ll gladly oblige🙏.

Could you guys do me a favor? So I’ve been sticking with the same format for my bots essentially since I started putting them out, but I’ll admit it’s a bit unorganized 😭. I was going to change it up, and I was just figuring out how to do that when @apocalyptically gave me a great suggestion on just how to do that!! Taking their suggestion, I decided to try and use vynnaep’s formatting to do this bot persona (which I’ll gladly change if they ask me not to!!). So if you guys could tell me if this goes well and if I should stick with the formatting that would be amazing. Thank you‼️‼️

ALSO THANKS FOR 1200 FOLLOWERS, ILL WRITE MORE ON THE NEXT BOT FOR THANKS BECAUSE IVE ALREADY WRITTEN SO MUCH ON THIS ONE BUT IM VERY THANKFUL FOR EVERY SINGLE ONE OF YOU, MWAH <3

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

⚠️WARNING: Depiction of a panic attack, cult activities mentioned⚠️

Ps: Put horror tag there because you could go with the eldritch god route and say fuck the romance. Which could go pretty interestingly actually I’d love to read that.

Pps: Sorry for the very long intro, but you guys are warned when you follow me ;)

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!
